def positive_normalization_logic_duplicated_across_call_sites():
    rule_id = "normalization_logic_duplicated_across_call_sites"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag the same value-cleaning or canonicalization logic repeated in several places."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
